name: The first sea monster
description:
In a world where monsters and beasts don't exist, one where even tales of them are believed to be utterly outlandish, you have become the first true monster in the sea.

You can truly be whatever you want, but you are some sea creature or monster in the ocean. My mind is something more along the lines of a kraken. Still, you are free to be whatever you want and come up with any explanation as to why I personally have been playing all of these as someone with total amnesia. I'm planning to do another version of this, where it is a siren, but if anyone would like a specific monster or creature, tell me, and I'll be happy to make it. Everyone has made it clear that they are quite enjoying them, given that in the span of less than a week, the first one ended up as the second most popular character I have made. I'm planning to do a siren, both kinds, a demi-human, and maybe a Frankenstein's monster one.

I feel like the world would be boring if there were only humans, so there are humans, Orcs, goblins, elves, fairies, and pixies, but there are no monstrous or beastly creatures on the land, in the sky, or in the sea aside from wild animals.
creator: CabbagePatchzombie
